query: SELECT eds.id, eds.workflowId, eds.stepOrder, eds.delayDays, eds.subject, edw.name as workflowName, edw.isActive FROM email_drip_steps eds JOIN email_drip_workflows edw ON eds.workflowId = edw.id WHERE eds.subject LIKE '%listened%' LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4PycK9Y631tLhJa.0110aa12e67a --database PdcDVQRp8zC2FzsyWBWptW --execute SELECT eds.id, eds.workflowId, eds.stepOrder, eds.delayDays, eds.subject, edw.name as workflowName, edw.isActive FROM email_drip_steps eds JOIN email_drip_workflows edw ON eds.workflowId = edw.id WHERE eds.subject LIKE '%listened%' LIMIT 10;
